_fill: YOU fill this. Who are the different types of users? What do they need, what frustrates them, what actions do they take?

personas.name: Persona Name
personas.description: A one-paragraph description of this persona — who they are and what they do on the platform.
goals: What they are trying to achieve
frustrations: What currently frustrates them before using your product
